created_because: Agents bypassed the repo GitHub issue templates when creating issues from review findings.
use_when: creating GitHub issues from review findings, dogfooding friction, bugs, or planning follow-ups
for nontrivial issue bodies, use --input-json, --from-lane, or --from-decomposition so semantic fields come from structured data
use --field only as a manual scalar fallback for simple one-off bodies; do not assemble Planning-derived fields in the shell

authority_boundary.agent_decision: The agent interprets issue intent; the aid only renders this repo's GitHub issue body from structured input.

promotion.trigger: promote if issue-template body generation proves useful outside this repo or becomes part of external-intent workflows

retirement.trigger: retire when issue creation is handled by a canonical package or GitHub connector flow
